_note: Hand-curated overrides for entries where the wiki MD does not yield clean stats. Keys are the slug id from the extractor. Re-running extract-bestiary.mjs merges these on top of the parsed entries.

cursed-trout.stub: No combat stats in canon — caught by line, not fought.

earthbound.stub: Stub source — single-line reference only on the EPK hunting-mishap table.

leviathan.stub: Named only in Psalm IV of the Misery Table. No stat block; an apocalyptic event, not an opposed creature.

long-angry-flesh-worm.stub: EPK 'In the Belly of the Beast' table flavor; no canonical stat block.

the-membrane-of-sarkantha.attack: Acid spray d6 (Agl dr14 to avoid); or be stuck (Str dr12 to push through, dr14 to escape, +2 per failed escape until dr20 — dissolution).
the-membrane-of-sarkantha.special: Cannot be killed by ordinary means. A failed escape stacks +2 dr; at dr20 the victim is absorbed and becomes part of the expanding membrane.

the-plant-of-life.attack: Tendril grab (Agl dr12 to avoid); if grabbed, dragged toward the mouth (Str dr14 or d6/round until escape or tendril severed).
the-plant-of-life.special: On death, all vines turn to black metal and the angelic faces to skulls. Big — impossible to miss.

sagsobuth.special: Cannot be harmed. Will not attack unless provoked. Trades violet poison and a Beechwood Tube containing a protean unclean scroll.

southern-frog.stub: Ingredient creature for Southern Frog stew; no canonical combat stats.

spider-owl.stub: Ingredient creature for Spider-Owl soup; no canonical combat stats.
